temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, blue-toned room, a man in a suit and glasses looks down with a serious expression. He is speaking to another man, who is seen from behind, holding a brightly lit lighter up to the first man's face, creating a dramatic, high-contrast image. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation. The man with the lighter is interrogating the man in the suit, who appears to be in a vulnerable or submissive position.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Subdued, serious. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense, ambient hum.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a close-up of a different man, who has a goatee and is smoking a cigarette. He exhales a plume of smoke, his eyes darting to the side as he listens intently to the ongoing conversation. (Storyline: This cut introduces a third character who is also part of the interrogation. His calm, smoking demeanor suggests he is a cool, calculating observer or participant.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense ambient hum continues.)
